rationale: The citing paper’s constructs and experiments focus on screen color, relaxation, perceived download speed, and website evaluations, while the cited paper is about search-and-alignment mechanisms in brand judgment revision under counterattitudinal challenges; the notes show no clear conceptual or methodological overlap. With only a DOI-level bibliography match and no in-text evidence of direct use, this looks like an incidental/background citation rather than a substantive dependency.
